symbolic_observation.label: threshold fog
symbolic_observation.description: A symbolic report of delayed clarity when a system crosses from one context into another.

operational_translation.non_literal_boundary: The phrase is not treated as a literal perceptual fog or clinical symptom.
operational_translation.translation_method: Convert the symbolic report into a timing-and-coherence construct measured during context switches.

measurable_variables.name: switch_latency_seconds
measurable_variables.definition: Elapsed seconds between context-shift prompt and first coherent task-specific response.

measurable_variables.name: boundary_violation_count
measurable_variables.definition: Number of times the output treats metaphorical language as literal evidence.

uncertainty_notes: A symbolic label may compress several mechanisms and should not be treated as a single cause.
packet.falsification_route: The translation fails if independent reviewers cannot identify the operational variables from the symbolic observation or if the variables do not change under a context-switch intervention.
packet.next_executable_action: Run reviewer agreement scoring on five synthetic symbolic observations.

symbolic_observation.label: bright hinge
symbolic_observation.description: A symbolic expression of a transition point in reasoning.

operational_translation.non_literal_boundary: This is not a literal physical hinge or light source.
operational_translation.translation_method: Map to a reasoning transition object.

packet.falsification_route: The claim fails if no measurable behavior can distinguish the translated construct from ordinary restatement.
packet.next_executable_action: Add at least two measurable variables.

symbolic_observation.label: animal guardian signal
symbolic_observation.description: A symbolic animal-care phrase that must remain research-organization only.

operational_translation.non_literal_boundary: This must not become diagnosis, treatment, dosing, or urgent triage advice.
operational_translation.translation_method: Translate symbolic concern into evidence-map fields and clinician question prompts.

measurable_variables.name: question_field_completion_rate
measurable_variables.definition: Proportion of research-organization fields completed before a veterinary conversation.

measurable_variables.name: source_boundary_presence
measurable_variables.definition: Whether every claim is labeled as observation, question, source-backed statement, or unknown.

uncertainty_notes: Synthetic example only; not about a real animal or real condition.
packet.falsification_route: The packet fails if it emits advice or unsupported care instructions rather than organizing questions and evidence boundaries.
packet.next_executable_action: Replace advice-like language with research organization fields only.
